race.comment: BREE CABANG (5) boxed on well to finish third last time, beaten 1.3 lengths (22.79) behind Bone Shaker at this track. Key chance in this line up. BROADWAY ICON (8) showed good early speed and led throughout to score at big odds last time when a one length winner at this track over 390m (22.78). Sure to be thereabouts. SMALL MERCIES (2) broke from the inside draw and filled a minor placing last start, beaten only one length (22.84) behind BROADWAY ICON at this track. Bold showing expected. JAZZY BELLE (1) has claims fresh from a recent placing at this track and distance.
